## PR type

What kind of change does this PR introduce?

- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Code style update (formatting, naming; no behavior change)
- [ ] Refactoring (no intended functional or API change)
- [ ] Build / dependency changes
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other (describe):

## PR checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I added or updated documentation where needed
- [ ] Build passes locally for the affected modules (e.g. `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`)
